mapper.select: SELECT c.no, c.board_no, c.member_no, c.content, TO_CHAR(c.regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regdate, TO_CHAR(c.update_date,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS update_date, c.is_deleted, m.member_id, m.name AS member_name FROM board_comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.no JOIN board b ON c.board_no = b.no WHERE c.board_no = #{boardNo} AND b.board_type = 'REVIEW' AND c.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY c.no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment ( no, board_no, member_no, content, regdate, is_deleted ) VALUES ( board_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{memberNo}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no} AND member_no = #{memberNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
